content.en:
Ye Tian took two copies of the Tribulation Blood, the Dragon Calamity Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor who contributed the most also took two and a half copies of the Tribulation Blood, and the remaining six invincible people each obtained one of the Tribulation Blood, so that the thirteen Tribulation Bloods were allocated, and no one objected.

After all, for them, this time is almost equivalent to the opportunity to pick up for nothing!

"The next thing is to divide these robbed bones!"

The Ancestor of the Dragon Calamity spoke.

"What is a robbery bone?" Ye Tian asked.

Wan Yuan Sword Ancestor explained: "The robbery bones come from the robbery beast, basically the robbery beasts above ten tribulations will give birth to the robbery bones, but the number is uncertain, this time we are lucky, this robbery beast has a total of nine robbery bones." There is only one role of bone robbery, that is, refining weapons, weapons suitable for our invincible people are very rare, such as the robbery weapon refined with bone robbery will help us a lot. The robbery bones are very precious, like the robbery bones of the thirty-seven tribulation beasts, one requires about 30,000 origin rule robbery crystals. "

"A Thirty Thousand Origin Rule Robbery Crystal !!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Only then did I realize that those Origin Rule Robbery Crystals obtained before were really not of much value, not to mention that they were not as good as robbing blood, and even these robbing bones were not as good!

It's no wonder that the invincibles have little interest in the One Tribulation Beast, because the One Tribulation Beast is really not worth much, and any good thing in the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Beasts far exceeds the value of the One Tribulation Beast, and killing the powerful Tribulation Beast is a money-making business.

It's a pity that the beasts are too dangerous, and before the strength of the beasts is confirmed, the invincibles don't dare to look for the beasts, and they will fall if they are not careful.

After some discussion, Ye Tian only obtained one robbery bone, and the others also got one robbery bone.

However, several other invincibles all gave Ye Tian more than 1,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals as compensation, after all, Ye Tian discovered this Tribulation Beast, so he naturally had more benefits.

Then, the flesh and blood of this robber beast was also distributed, and it also had some value, probably worth dozens of origin rule robber crystals.

And just like that, the beast was divided.

After the assignment, Ye Tian left the Cloud Mist World and returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain.

The invincible people of Calamity Black Mountain and the Firmament Sword Tomb also returned to their own worlds, and this is the end of the cooperation.

Calamity Montenegro.

An invincible man asked the Ancestor of the Dragon Calamity: "Lord of the Ancestor of the Dragon Calamity, why don't we just take down that Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws, with your strength and us, there is definitely a hope of taking down the other party." "

"It's too risky!" "The ancestor of the dragon calamity said: "The other party actually became an invincible person in one or two great tribulation eras, such a talent is too terrifying, and you dare to guarantee that the other party's two invincible bodies have an ontology, what if they are both doppelgangers? Besides, it is not worth doing it for the sake of two blood robbery, one bone robbery, and some origin rules to rob crystals. Even if the other party really comes in person, you make sure that the people of the Firmament Sword Tomb will not help him, and it is estimated that they will create a future enemy for us? Besides, this ancestor of ten thousand laws may be using his clone to find the beast, so he is not afraid of falling. Maybe in the future, we will have a chance to cooperate with him and get more blood, so there is no need to offend him. "

"The Ancestor of the Dragon Calamity is right!"

The other invincibles nodded.

Similarly, there was a similar conversation on the Firmament Sword Tomb.

---------------

"Didn't you do it?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He also thought that the Firmament Sword Tomb and the invincible people of Calamity Black Mountain would attack him, but nothing happened, which was naturally a good thing.

After returning to the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian began to retreat to absorb and refine the two tribulation bloods.

And the Firmament Sword Tomb and the Calamity Black Mountain destroyed those two second-order gates, and no longer established a base in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

At this point, except for some gates controlled by Ye Tian, there were no more doors of exotic forces in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

It can be said that the Terrans have completely controlled the Dark Forbidden Realm, and there are no more external enemies.

Ye Tian absorbed and refined the blood of the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Tribulation Beasts, and the endless gentle tribulation power poured into Ye Tian's body, constantly refining the invincible tribulation body.

The utilization rate of other invincible people for blood robbery is only about ten percent, and most of them will be wasted, but Ye Tian, who has the secret technique of transforming the tribulation and the eternal talent of tribulation, can definitely use the blood robbery one hundred percent.

Therefore, in his hands, two parts of the blood tribulation were at least equivalent to the effect of other invincible people refining twenty parts of the blood of the tribulation.

It is conceivable that once he completely refines these two tribulation bloods, he is afraid that his cultivation will increase significantly, and his combat power will naturally skyrocket by a catastrophe.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's tribulation blood was constantly refined, the invincible tribulation body became stronger and stronger, and his cultivation became higher and higher.

Ye Tian used the Secret Technique of Transforming the Tribulation, and the refining speed was very fast, in just a few realm years, Ye Tian had completely refined one of the Tribulation Blood, and after spending a period of time to stabilize the realm, he began to refine the second Tribulation Blood.

Perhaps because of the strong strength, the refining speed was faster this time.

About two realm years had passed, and the second blood tribulation had also been refined by Ye Tian.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the Source Sea, tested his strength, and found that his combat strength had increased by about three times.

Originally, his strength was very strong among the sixth-rank invincibles, but now his strength has increased by three times, although he is still not as good as the invincible people such as the ancestor of the Dragon Calamity, but it is not much weaker, about equivalent to the strength of the thirty-seven tribulation beasts.

In other words, he is not far from the threshold of a fifth-class invincible.

But if you don't create an invincible ancestral skill, just using some treasure resources to improve your cultivation, the increase in strength is limited, and you can't improve it at all in the later stage.

However, if you want to create an invincible ancestral skill, you must go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth to understand the rules of the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

There is no Great Tribulation in the Eternal Heaven and Earth, so the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal will not be born, so you must go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth in person.

"Look for some more beasts, and when your strength is so strong that it is difficult to progress again, then go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth!" Ye Tian planned.

In the days that followed, he continued to search for the raider.

This time, his strength is strong, so even if he encounters a powerful robbery beast, he will not be killed easily, but when he encounters a robbery beast of thousands of tribulations, he naturally still can't escape.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian encountered a robbery beast that was expected to be hunted, and he didn't need to rely on others, just relying on the replication body and the combat power of the two invincible clones, there was hope to hunt it, just because this robbery beast only had twenty-eight tribulations.
